name: Meatball Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 16 oz can whole tomatoes, undrained, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ground beef with chopped onion, egg, bread crumbs, salt, and pepper. Shape the mixture into about 24 meatballs.
2. Brown the meatballs in butter or margarine; drain well.
3. Stir together tomatoes, water, beef base, garlic powder, seasoned salt, and Italian seasoning.
4. Place carrots, potatoes, and sliced onion at the bottom of a Crock-Pot.
5. Top with the meatballs and pour the tomato mixture over everything.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours.
7. Before serving, remove the meatballs using a slotted spoon.
8. Make a smooth paste from cornstarch and cold water. Stir into the vegetables in the Crock-Pot; cover and cook on High for 10 minutes or until thickened.
9. Return the meatballs to the stew and serve.
Serves 6
